title: Mr M Linthwaite v Plumtree Hotels (Dragon) Ltd (In Creditors Voluntary  Liquidation): 1600320/2025
text:
Case Number: 1600320/2025 
 
 
 
EMPLOYMENT TRIBUNALS 
 
Claimant:   Mr M Linthwaite 
  
Respondent:  Plumtree Hotels (Dragon) Ltd (In Creditors Voluntary 
Liquidation) 
 
JUDGMENT 
 
1. The Claimant succeeds in his claim for unpaid wages in the amount of £2116.47. 
 
 
 
 
 
Approved by: 
 
 
      Employment Judge Lloyd-Lawrie 
       
25/09/2025  
 
              JUDGMENT SENT TO THE PARTIES ON 
 
30 September 2025 
 
Katie Dickson 
      FOR THE TRIBUNAL OFFICE 
 
Notes 
Written reasons will not be provided unless a written request is presented by 
either party within 14 days of the sending of this written record of the decision. 
 
Judgments and reasons for the judgments are published, in full, online at 
www.gov.uk/employment-tribunal-decisions shortly after a copy has been sent to 
the claimant(s) and respondent(s) in a case.
